description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python that runs on push to main and python branches and on pull requests to main. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macOS-latest, with Python 3.7, 3.8, and 3.9, and Debug and Release configurations. For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies from requirements.txt, and perform builds and an import test.
